synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21310 Oracle Linux 10 .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21310
description:
[10.0.100-2.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100-2]
- Do not include -rtm in version strings of the SDK
- Related: RHEL-125751

[10.0.100-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100 and Runtime 10.0.0
- Resolves: RHEL-125751

[10.0.100~rc.2.25502.107-0.12]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100-rc.2.25502.107 and Runtime 10.0.0-rc.2.25502.107
- Resolves: RHEL-121558

[10.0.100~rc.1.25451.107-0.11]
- Disable bootstrap
- Related: RHEL-114571

[10.0.100~rc.1.25451.107-0.10]
- Update to .NET 10 RC 1
- Resolves: RHEL-114571
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21310

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21310.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-10.0-10.0.0-2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-10.0-10.0.0-2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

dotnet-host-10.0.0-2.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

dotnet-hostfxr-10.0-10.0.0-2.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm

SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/dotnet10.0-10.0.100-2.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[10.0.100-2.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100-2]
- Do not include -rtm in version strings of the SDK
- Related: RHEL-125751

[10.0.100-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100 and Runtime 10.0.0
- Resolves: RHEL-125751

[10.0.100~rc.2.25502.107-0.12]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100-rc.2.25502.107 and Runtime 10.0.0-rc.2.25502.107
- Resolves: RHEL-121558

[10.0.100~rc.1.25451.107-0.11]
- Disable bootstrap
- Related: RHEL-114571

- Update to .NET 10 RC 1
